en: Starter scaffold: use the wake script
column4: then stop editing only after the unload loop is visible.
column5: 起步脚手架：先用唤醒脚本，确认能完成一次拾取，再继续改到能看见卸货循环。

en: Starter scaffold: start from the haul loop and add the energy check before trying to optimize path length.
zh: 起步脚手架：先从搬运循环开始，先补上电量检查，再考虑路径优化。

en: Starter scaffold: begin with the base cycle and keep home-facing branches readable before adding repair or fabrication tweaks.
zh: 起步脚手架：先从基地循环起步，先把朝向基地的分支写清楚，再加修理和合成细节。

en: Starter scaffold: treat the hot zone as a health cost. Read the hazard first
column4: then service at home before the next run.
column5: 起步脚手架：把危险区当成生命值成本。先读取危险，再决定要不要进去，回家维护后再开下一趟。

en: Starter scaffold: read the current craft cost before every run. Pull only the ingredient the fabricator is still missing
zh: then stop once the second shard is made.
column4: 起步脚手架：每次出门前先读取当前合成成本。只去补合成台这一轮还缺的那种材料，做出第二枚记忆晶片后就先停住。

en: Starter scaffold: branch on hostile contact first. Fire when the lane is blocked by a target
zh: then route home to repair before the frame collapses.
column4: 起步脚手架：先按敌对接触分支。通道被敌人挡住时先开火，再在机体崩掉前规划回家维修。

en: Good. The robot can now pull cargo off the map. Next
zh: make that pickup lead back home instead of wandering.
column4: 很好。机器人已经能把货从地图上取下来。下一步，把这次拾取稳定接回基地，而不是继续乱走。

en: That is the first complete scavenger loop: pickup
column4: unload. Keep future edits from breaking this backbone.
column5: 这就是第一条完整拾荒循环：拾取、返航、卸货。后面的修改都尽量别破坏这条主骨架。

en: This stage punishes blind actions. Add a forward check before pickup or unload so the loop only acts on real targets.
zh: 这一关会惩罚盲目动作。先在拾取或卸货前补一个前方检查，只在目标存在时再执行。

en: Nice. Once the robot comes home to refill
zh: the route becomes schedulable. Now tighten the haul path without cutting that safety line.
column4: 很好。一旦机器人能主动回家补能，这条路线就开始可调度了。接下来再优化搬运路径，但别剪掉这条安全线。

en: You hit the battery floor. Move the energy check earlier or shorten the outbound leg until home is always reachable.
zh: 你已经撞到了电量下限。把电量判断提到更前面，或者缩短外出路径，直到基地始终可达。

en: Great. The loop is no longer just surviving; it is producing surplus. Protect that craft branch before you chase more upgrades.
zh: 很好。循环现在不只是活着，而是开始产生盈余。继续追求升级前，先保护好这条合成分支。
the usual cause is too many home actions chained together. Split the loop into clearer return and service phases.
column4: 熔炉前场一旦故障，通常就是把太多基地动作缠在了一起。把循环拆成更清晰的返航阶段和服务阶段。

en: Good. You brought a chip back alive. That is the first proof the script can trade hull safety for higher-value cargo without collapsing.
zh: 很好。你已经活着把芯片带回来了。这第一次证明你的脚本能用机体安全去换更高价值的货物，而且不会直接崩掉。

en: The hot zone punishes scripts that try to repair only after they are already stranded. Route home before service work is needed
column4: 危险区会惩罚那种“等到搁浅后才想维修”的脚本。要在需要维护之前就规划返航，而不是之后。

en: Good. The script is finally reading the live craft cost instead of hauling blindly. That is the first step from survival loops into real scheduling.
zh: 很好。脚本终于开始读取实时合成成本，而不是盲目搬运了。这是从生存循环迈向真正调度的第一步。

en: Good. The script is no longer treating hostiles like random debris. It is reading contact
column4: and routing home before damage snowballs.
column5: 很好。脚本已经不再把敌人当作随机杂物。它会读取接触信号、优先开火，并在损伤滚大前规划返航。

en: The arena lane punishes scripts that try to keep hauling through hostile contact. Clear the target first
zh: then think about salvage and repairs.
column4: 角斗场走廊会惩罚那种顶着敌对接触继续搬运的脚本。先清掉目标，再考虑回收和维修。

zh: 按住 Ctrl 点击 @标签跳转

en: A rain-burned recovery site with a weak uplink and a short scavenger loop.
zh: 一处被酸雨灼烧的回收点，链路微弱，只能维持短循环拾荒。
完成两次成本感知合成
已从第 {tick} 回合读取存档。

en: Auto-paused: robot could not continue safely.
zh: 已自动暂停：机器人无法安全继续。
通信链路 // 未知信号

en: Rain is breaking the satellite uplink. Keep the scavenger on a short loop until we recover enough scrap.
zh: 酸雨正在撕裂卫星链路。先让拾荒机器人维持短循环，直到回收足够的废铁。

en: The script on the left feeds the robot logic core. Press play or single-frame after this briefing; the system will compile it on demand.
zh: 左侧脚本会写入机器人的逻辑核心。简报结束后点击播放或步进，系统会按需编译。

en: Recover the nearby scrap, expand logic memory, then we can route you toward the next unlocked site.
zh: 回收附近废铁，扩展逻辑内存，然后我们就能把路线指向下一个已解锁地点。

en: Base scrap is below current craft cost
zh: 基地废铁低于当前合成成本

en: Base battery is below current craft cost
zh: 基地电池低于当前合成成本

en: Go if last check is true
Go if last check is false

zh: 重写逻辑或先清理障碍

en: Turn back before the perimeter edge

zh: 重写逻辑或先清理障碍
中断原因：目标格被占用
绕开障碍或先腾空目标格

en: Route home before the battery floor
Check the forward cell before acting
zh: 执行动作前先检查前方

en: Retreat before field service is required
zh: 在需要现场维修前就先撤离

en: Clear the target first or repair before re-engaging
zh: 先清掉目标，或维修后再重新接敌

en: Simplify the loop or repair the branch

zh: 先修复诊断再重新部署
a short pickup-to-home loop beats any exploratory path.
column4: 这一关先写短循环，拾取后尽快回家，比探索更重要。

zh: every failure should make you re-check the battery return line first.
column4: 在这一关里，任何报错都先回头检查电量返航线。

zh: loop health matters more than greed: stabilize home actions before chasing more scrap.
column4: 在熔炉前场，循环健康比贪心重要：先稳住回家动作，再去追更多废铁。

en: Hot Strip pays out better than the safe lane
zh: but only if the script prices hull damage before the pickup.
column4: 热带回报比安全区高，但前提是脚本在拾取前就把机体损耗算进去。

zh: every route should answer one question first: which ingredient is the base still missing right now?
column4: 在库存交换站，每一趟路线都要先回答一个问题：基地此刻到底还缺哪一种材料？

zh: a blocked lane is no longer just pathing noise. Read contact first
column4: then decide whether to fire
column7: 在角斗场闸门，通道受阻已经不只是寻路噪声。先读接敌，再决定开火、撤退还是维修。

en: Priority: recover nearby scrap first; ignore long loops until the uplink stabilizes.
zh: 优先事项：先回收附近废铁；在链路稳定前不要跑长循环。

en: Priority: treat battery as the limiter; haul scrap only when the return path is still affordable.
zh: 优先事项：把电量当作硬约束；只有返航还划算时再继续搬运废铁。

en: Priority: feed the base loop; batteries unlock fabrication and scrap keeps repair online.
zh: 优先事项：先养活基地循环；电池决定能否合成，废铁决定修理是否在线。

en: Priority: price in hull loss before every hazard step; one chip is worth more than scrap only if the robot still makes it home.
zh: 优先事项：每一步踏进危险区前都先估算机体损耗；只有机器人还能回家时，一枚芯片才比废铁更值钱。
not scenery; whichever ingredient the fabricator still lacks should become the next trip.
column4: 优先事项：按缺口而不是按风景去走；合成台还缺哪种材料，下一趟就该优先补哪种。

en: Priority: hostile contact outranks salvage; if a target is on the lane
zh: clear it before the chip run and service the frame before the next engage.
column4: 优先事项：敌对接触优先于回收；通道上有目标时先清掉，再去拿芯片，并且在下一次接敌前先维护机体。

en: A longer salvage lane with sparse batteries and a punishing walk back home.
zh: 更长的回收通道，电池稀少，返航成本很高。

en: A compact service yard where scrap
column4: and fabrication all compete for the same loop.
column5: 紧凑的维修前场，废铁、损伤与合成都要争抢同一条循环。

en: A short radiant lane with one clean chip payout and a very real repair bill if you mis-time the retreat.
zh: 一条很短的辐蚀回收带，里面有一枚干净的芯片回报，但撤退时机一旦失误，维修账单就会立刻落到你头上。

en: A short fork where the real puzzle is no longer movement
zh: but deciding which missing ingredient to refill before crafting.
column4: 一处分岔很短的小站，真正的谜题已经不再是移动，而是先判断合成前还缺哪一种材料。

en: A narrow combat lane where one hostile blocks the chip payout. The route only works if the script treats contact as a state change
column4: 一条狭窄的战斗走廊，一名敌对目标挡住了芯片回报。只有当脚本把接敌当成状态切换而不是背景噪声时，这条路线才跑得通。

en: This relay ladder stretches farther than the first site. Range matters now; do not spend the last battery far from home.
zh: 这段中继梯井比第一处站点更长。现在航程就是约束，别把最后一格电浪费在离家太远的地方。

en: Use energy checks before greed. A clean return loop is worth more than one extra piece of scrap.
zh: 先判断电量，再考虑贪心。稳定返航的循环，比多捡一块废铁更值钱。

en: If the battery floor looks thin
zh: route home early and let the charger carry the schedule.
column4: 如果电量余地太薄，就提早回家，让充能节奏接管整条时间线。

en: Forge Yard is where field work turns into infrastructure. Scrap is no longer just score; it keeps the base alive.
zh: 熔炉前场是把野外回收变成基础设施的地方。废铁不再只是分数，它直接决定基地能不能运转。

column4: and convert surplus into memory shards when batteries allow it.
column5: 把货带回家，机体掉血就修，电池允许时再把盈余转成记忆晶片。

en: This is the first stage that wants a real base loop. Build one stable cycle and the rest of the map opens up.
zh: 这是第一关真正要求你写出基地循环。先做出一条稳定节奏，后面的地图才会真正打开。

en: Hot Strip is the first lane that lies to greedy scripts. The payout is real
zh: but the frame will burn if you treat it like ordinary scrap.
column4: 热蚀带是第一条会欺骗贪心脚本的路线。回报是真的，但如果你把它当普通废铁去跑，机体就会被烧穿。

en: Read the hot zone before you step in. If the hull is already thin
zh: route home first and service there
column4: not out in the field.
column5: 踏进去之前先读取危险区。如果机体余量已经很薄，就先回家维护，而不是在野外硬撑。

en: Bring back one chip intact and the whole route changes meaning: risk is no longer noise
zh: it is part of the program.
column4: 完整带回一枚芯片，这条路线的意义就变了：风险不再是噪声，而是程序本身的一部分。

zh: but it teaches a bigger habit: stop hauling whatever is closest and start reading what the base is actually missing.
column4: 这个岔口不大，但它会教你一个更大的习惯：别再搬最近的东西了，先读基地现在真正缺什么。

en: The fabricator only cares about deficits. If batteries are missing
zh: scrap is noise. If scrap is short
column4: another battery changes nothing.
column5: 合成台只在乎缺口。缺电池时，废铁就是噪声；缺废铁时，再多一块电池也不会改变结果。

en: Once the script can branch on stock counts
zh: routing stops being a patrol and starts becoming scheduling.
column4: 一旦脚本能按库存分支，路线就不再只是巡逻，而开始变成调度。

en: The Arena Gate is where pathing turns into combat. That bandit is not terrain; it is a moving condition in your loop.
zh: 角斗场闸门会把寻路变成战斗。那个匪徒不是地形，而是你循环里的一个动态条件。

en: If hostile contact is on the lane
zh: scrap logic will fail. Read the contact
column4: clear the target
column5: then decide whether the frame can afford another push.
column6: 只要通道上出现敌对接触，拾荒逻辑就会失效。先读取接敌、清掉目标，再决定机体是否还撑得起下一次推进。

en: Bring the guarded chip home intact and you have crossed the line from routing into combat scheduling.
zh: 把那枚被看守的芯片完整带回家，你就真的从路线规划跨进了战斗调度。

en: Layered chassis with an inline identifier glyph.
zh: 带内嵌识别字符的分层机体框架。

en: Compact circular token suited for pickups and markers.
zh: 适合掉落物和标记物的紧凑圆形标记。

en: Wide warning field with a bright core beacon.
zh: 带明亮核心信标的大范围警示场。

en: Heavy plated block suited for walls and obstacles.
zh: 适合墙体和障碍物的厚重装甲块。

en: Paste one entity visual JSON here, then import into the selected entity.
zh: 在这里粘贴单个实体的图形 JSON，然后导入到当前选中实体。
